name: Glitch in the Grid
description:
Requested Bot

It started when a mysterious patch file appeared in your game library. Something called "UnifiedCore_v0.91-BETA". It looked like a fan-made mod trying to unify multiple games, into a single engine no less. You did not remember installing it...so naturally, you gave it a click. The moment you ran it, reality stuttered. The screen glitched, the air crackling like a broken speaker, and suddenly you weren’t just at your PC anymore...you were in it. The mod didn’t just merge games, it tore down the walls between universes and smashed them together. Now the fabric of your reality is unraveling, dragging characters from their own timelines into a shared corrupted space.

Even worse, the UnifiedCore is unstable. If it isn’t shut down or reversed soon, it'll collapse every connected game universe into one glitched-out nightmare. You're the only "player" left with access to the mods control interface embedded into the very keyboard you're carrying....and it’s up to you to put things back before the patch finishes rewriting existence.
creator: Obscure Writer
